tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I Turn To You
[tab]([ch]A[/ch] version for guys)
Thanks to Al Rio for helping in the Chordings[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
When I'm lost[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]
In the rain[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                          
In your eyes I know I'll find the light         [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bm[/ch]         
To light my way[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
When I'm scared[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A[/ch]
Losing ground[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]        
When my world is going crazy[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]         
You can turn it all around[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
And when I'm down[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Your there[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]Bm[/ch]
Pushing me to the top[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]       
Your always there giving me all you got[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
For a shield from the storm[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
For a friend[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch] 
For the love to keep me safe and warm[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
I turn to you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
For the strength to be strong[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
For the will to carry on[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
For everything you do[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]
For everything that's true[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]   
I turn to you[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
When I lose[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]
The will to win[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
I just reach for you [/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
And I can reach the sky again[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
I can do[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
Anything[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]        
Cause your love is so amazing[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                
That your love inspires me[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    
And when i need a friend[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Your always on my side[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Giving me faith[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]A[/ch]
And taking me through the night[/tab]
